learning.concept: Output is the result from the computer after processing.
learning.explanation: Once a program finishes its work, it needs to show the result on a monitor, printer, or speaker.

analogy.title: Restaurant Food
analogy.body:
Your food being served at the table is the output of the restaurant's process.

👉 Kitchen (Process) results in a meal (Output).

practice.a: Reading a result text on your phone.
Getting a hard copy of an essay.
Hearing music from a Spotify app.
